_readme: Notification templates for different channels. LLMs can add new templates here.
_usage: Templates use {{variable}} syntax. Variables come from notification metadata.

email.subject: Security Alert - {{app_name}}

in_app.title: Welcome to {{app_name}}! 🎉
in_app.body: We're excited to have you on board. Explore your dashboard to get started.

email.subject: Welcome to {{app_name}}!
email.text_body:
Hi {{username}},

Welcome to {{app_name}}! We're thrilled to have you.

Get started by exploring your dashboard.

Best regards,
{{app_name}} Team

email.subject: Password Reset Request - {{app_name}}
email.text_body:
Hi {{username}},

You requested a password reset. Click here to reset: {{reset_link}}

This link expires in {{expiry_hours}} hours.

If you didn't request this, ignore this email.

sms.body: {{app_name}} password reset code: {{reset_code}}. Expires in {{expiry_minutes}} min.

email.subject: Your Daily Summary - {{app_name}}
Your Weekly Summary - {{app_name}}
